#!/bin/bash

BOLD='\033[1m'
DIM='\033[2m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[0;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

log() { echo -e "${BOLD}${CYAN}[pi]${NC} $1"; }

RESOLVE="$0"
while [ -L "$RESOLVE" ]; do
  DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$RESOLVE")" && pwd)"
  RESOLVE="$(readlink "$RESOLVE")"
  [[ "$RESOLVE" != /* ]] && RESOLVE="$DIR/$RESOLVE"
done
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$RESOLVE")" && pwd)"
COMPOSE_FILE="$SCRIPT_DIR/docker-compose.yml"
TEAM_FILE="$SCRIPT_DIR/pi/agent/extensions/team.yaml"

HOST_WS="$(pwd)"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Parse team names and commands from team.yaml
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
parse_teams() {
  local section=false
  while IFS= read -r line; do
    # Skip comments and empty lines
    [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && continue
    [[ -z "${line// }" ]] && continue

    if [[ "$line" == "team:" ]]; then
      section=true
      continue
    fi

    if $section; then
      # Match "  name:" lines (2-space indent)
      if [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]{2}([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+): ]]; then
        echo "${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
      fi
    fi
  done < "$TEAM_FILE"
}

get_team_command() {
  local team="$1"
  local section=false current=""
  while IFS= read -r line; do
    [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && continue
    [[ -z "${line// }" ]] && continue

    if [[ "$line" == "team:" ]]; then
      section=true

    if [[ "$current" == "$team" ]] && [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]+${field}:[[:space:]]*(.+)$ ]]; then
      echo "${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"

    fi
